ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type_1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type_2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon (if applicable) */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation the Pokémon belongs to */,
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the Pokémon */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience gained for defeating the Pokémon */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of abilities the Pokémon can have */,
  "evolution_chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolution chain the Pokémon belongs to */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic entry */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the Pokémon in the given format and region */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the Pokémon was used */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles in the given format and region */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of usage */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitive format */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the Pokémon in the given format and region */,
  "average_battles_per_usage" REAL /* Average number of battles per usage */,
  "average_damage_dealt" REAL /* Average damage dealt by the Pokémon */,
  "average_damage_taken" REAL /* Average damage taken by the Pokémon */,
  "average_turns_survived" REAL /* Average number of turns the Pokémon survives */,
  "average_team_position" REAL /* Average team position (1-6) of the Pokémon */,
  "average_speed_stat" REAL /* Average speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "average_defense_stat" REAL /* Average defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "average_special_defense_stat" REAL /* Average special defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "average_attack_stat" REAL /* Average attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "average_special_attack_stat" REAL /* Average special attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES competitive_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitive_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitive format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitive format (e.g., Singles, Doubles, VGC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competitive format */,
  "allowed_pokemon_count" INTEGER /* Number of Pokémon allowed in the team for this format */,
  "item_restriction" TEXT /* Any restrictions on items (e.g., no Choice items) */,
  "level_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum level of Pokémon allowed in this format */,
  "dynamic_weather" INTEGER /* Indicates if dynamic weather is allowed in this format */,
  "is_double_battle" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is a double battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "active_season" TEXT /* Current active season for competitive events in the region */,
  "popular_format" TEXT /* Most popular competitive format in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon type (e.g., Water, Fire) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon type */,
  "damage_relations" TEXT /* JSON string describing the damage relations (e.g., super effective, not very effective) of the type */,
  "popular_in_generation" TEXT /* Generation where the type is most popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation (e.g., Gen 1, Gen 8) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generation */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the generation started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the generation ended */,
  "popular_type" TEXT /* Most popular type in the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, game developer, content creator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string describing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES usage_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitive format */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_value" TEXT /* Value or metric associated with the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend (0-1) */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value or metric for future trends */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used to derive the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES competitive_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
